A

addBomb(Bomb) - Static method in class model.Bomb
Adds a bomb in the bombs ArrayList
addMonstersView(String, int, int, int) - Static method in class view.MonsterView
Adds a new monster in the array
addMonstersView(String, int, int, int, boolean) - Static method in class view.MonsterView
Adds a new monster in the array
AssetSetter - Class in controller
Class to place the various objects and monsters on the map
